caption: The video features a man playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with colorful embroidery. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background, suggesting a classroom or auditorium environment. The audience, consisting of children with their backs to the camera, is attentively watching and listening to the performance. The man seems focused and engaged as he plays and sings, creating a warm and interactive atmosphere. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the organization or event.
